title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, embed, list, delete models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a local LLM provider for chains, agents, and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user); runs in Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, streaming, embeddings, list/pull/delete models.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage local models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Cross-platform TUI client for chatting with Ollama models inside the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistent storage support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama; use local models for generative QA, summarization, and retrieval.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama models inside no-code workflows (chat, generate, embed).

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that sends selected blocks to an Ollama model for summarization or continuation.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats, generates images, and moderates using Ollama backends.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for LLM-powered tests.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot server (Go) that answers app mentions with streaming responses from Ollama.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin to run local LLM prompts on selected notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-mistral
summary: PyPI package providing thin wrapper and prompt templates optimized for Mistral models on Ollama.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client for Ollama with async HTTP, streaming, and model management routines.
